items.name: CompactShell
items.doc: CompactShell — fullscreen shell for Steam Deck, handheld, and small-screen targets.

items.name: title
items.doc: Page or app title shown in the top bar.

items.name: nav-items
items.doc: Navigation items rendered in the bottom bar or side rail.

items.name: active-view
items.doc: Id of the currently active view / slot.

items.name: show-topbar
items.doc: Whether the top bar is visible.

items.name: show-back
items.doc: Whether the back button in the top bar is shown.

items.name: nav-mode
items.doc: Nav chrome mode forwarded to CompactNav.

items.name: navigate
items.doc: Fired when a nav item is tapped.

items.name: back
items.doc: Fired when the top-bar back button is tapped.
